audit_items.proof_trace: The main LDAP-reachable auth path (`lutil_passwd`) guards both `passwd` and `cred` for NULL at L274–278 before any dereference. Public API functions `lutil_passwd_hash`, `lutil_passwd_generate`, and `lutil_passwd_add` lack null checks on their pointer parameters, but all LDAP-reachable callers pass valid non-null pointers: `servers/slapd/passwd.c` gates the `rs_new.bv_len > 0` invariant (L200–204) before calling hash functions, and static init callers use valid table entries. No current external call path injects NULL into any dereference site in passwd.c.
